rule Linux_Ransomware_Agenda_4562a654
{
	meta:
		author = "Elastic Security"

		last_modified = "2024-11-22"

		severity = 100
		arch_context = "x86, arm64"
		scan_context = "file, memory"

	strings:
		$ = "%s_RECOVER.txt"
		$ = "-- Qilin"
		$ = "no-vm-kill"
		$ = "File extensions blacklist: [%s]"

	condition:
		3 of them
}
